description: Add configSchema with optional instanceUrl to the Retool plugin so users with self-hosted Retool instances can configure their custom domain. The existing retool.com SaaS pattern is preserved.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/retool && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add configSchema with instanceUrl to Retool plugin
userStories.description: Add a configSchema property with an optional instanceUrl field of type 'url' to the Retool plugin class and package.json opentabs field. Keep existing SaaS urlPatterns and homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: RetoolPlugin class has `override readonly configSchema: ConfigSchema` with an `instanceUrl` field of type 'url', required: false
package.json opentabs field has a `configSchema` object with the same `instanceUrl` definition
Existing `urlPatterns: ['*://*.retool.com/*']` is preserved in both src/index.ts and package.json
Existing `homepage` field is preserved (currently set in src/index.ts but not in package.json — add it to package.json too)
